title: PS1 Echo Font
body:
# i was looking to make minecraft seem like a ps1 game and something felt off.

here i present you with a playstation 1 themed font resourcepack since i havent found one myself

it was made by taking resident evil 1* font and stretching it (due to nature of these kinds of things) until it fit. it also gets ugly.

goes good with [back to basics shaders!](https://modrinth.com/shader/btb-back-to-basics)
also goes awesome with [crusty audio resourcepack!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/crusty-audio)

it was made for 1.21.1, but may work on other version

some of the characters may not be supported yet (such as @) and may contain bleed-ins. i will update that eventually.

only available (for now): english letters, some extra characters and numbers

*i own none of the assets used and the copyright goes to the original owners.
